---
output: 
  html_document: 
    highlight: tango
    theme: cerulean
    css: style.css
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---


# REVISÃO TEMAS ESPECÍFICOS ADS: BANCO DE DADOS

#### 09/06/2026 {.unnumbered}

#### Professor Miguél Suares {.unnumbered}


```{r 10-impressao-01-html, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
rmarkdown::render("10-revisao-10-2026-06-09.Rmd", output_dir="docs", output_file ="temporario.html" , output_format = "html_document") ; utils::browseURL("docs/temporario.html")
```

```{r 10-impressao-02-docx, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
rmarkdown::render("10-revisao-10-2026-06-09.Rmd", output_dir="docs", output_file ="temporario.docx" , output_format = "word_document") ; utils::browseURL("docs/temporario.docx")
```
